response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified "Mr. Showtime" via on-screen text at 00:00.
2. Searched "Mr. Showtime" and confirmed original artists Hitoshizuku-P × Yama.
3. Search results confirmed the performers in this specific 3D cover as Shiranui Flare, Himemori Luna, Anya Melfissa, and IRyS.
4. Performed web search for lyrics in Japanese and English.
5. Structured JSON to include the musical performance and the subsequent dialogue scene.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual 3D performance of the song "Mr. Showtime" by four Hololive members (Shiranui Flare, Himemori Luna, Anya Melfissa, and IRyS), followed by a short dialogue interval among the performers.

scenes.description: The four performers dance and sing "Mr. Showtime" in a virtual 3D stage setup. The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ひとりぼっちの舞台(セカイ)に響く モノローグ
あれもこれも できやしない？
回る回る 思考回路(メリーゴーランド)
とっちらかっちゃって まとまらない
どうすりゃいいの？ 迷い込んだ
袋小路(ラビリンス)？ 行き止まりでも諦めない！
賭けろ スタダム！ 賭けろ スタダム！ 賭けろ スタダム！
止まれないまま it's showtime!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just a monologue, resonating on a stage where I'm all alone.
Is it impossible for me to do this and that?
My thought process (a merry-go-round) goes round and round.
The more I mess around and waste time, the more I become hungry.
And I can't handle it. Here and there, moving forward and getting stuck.
A cul-de-sac in a labyrinth?
Even if it's a dead end, I won't give up!
I'll bet it all on this, I'll bet it all on this, I'll bet it all on this!
Still unstoppable, it's showtime!!

scenes.description: The musical performance concludes, and the four characters engage in a brief, informal dialogue on stage.
